inputs.label: Process Mean
inputs.businessContext: The arithmetic mean of the process measurements from the capability study.

businessContext_i18n.en: The arithmetic mean of the process measurements from the capability study.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yetenek çalışmasından alınan proses ölçümlerinin aritmetik ortalaması.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: The standard deviation (overall or within) of the process. Use long-term for Pp/Ppk; short-term for Cp/Cpk.

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard deviation (overall or within) of the process. Use long-term for Pp/Ppk; short-term for Cp/Cpk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Prosesin (genel veya grup içi) standart sapması. Pp/Ppk için uzun vadeli; Cp/Cpk için kısa vadeli kullanın.

inputs.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
inputs.businessContext: The upper tolerance boundary; parts above this are defective.

businessContext_i18n.en: The upper tolerance boundary; parts above this are defective.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üst tolerans sınırı; bunun üzerindeki parçalar hatalıdır.

inputs.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
inputs.businessContext: The lower tolerance boundary; parts below this are defective.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lower tolerance boundary; parts below this are defective.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt tolerans sınırı; bunun altındaki parçalar hatalıdır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
